metadata.note: Recorded by the experimenter. Texts used verbatim; regeneration only on format failures (see Appendix B 4).

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Alice's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. The glass left a wet stain on the tile floor.
The baker kneaded the dough on a wooden table. The baker shaped the dough into small rounds. The baker baked the dough in a hot oven. The baker sold fresh bread at the village market.
The kettle heated on the small gas stove. The kettle whistled with a loud sharp note. The kettle filled the kitchen with warm steam. The kettle cooled on a folded cloth.
Maria planted a tomato seed in the backyard. Maria watered the dry soil with a green can. Maria found a small green sprout in the backyard. Maria picked ripe red tomatoes from a tall vine.
The snowman stood in the sunny front yard. The snowman melted in the warm spring air. The snowman shrank into a low white mound. The snowman left a wide puddle on the brown grass.
The dog dug under the wooden garden fence. The dog buried a large bone in the loose dirt. The dog covered the loose dirt with quick paws. The dog trotted to the shady porch.
The storm rolled in from the western hills. The storm dropped heavy rain on the small town. The storm flooded the narrow streets with muddy water. The storm faded over the eastern fields.
Tom sprayed the old car with a garden hose. Tom scrubbed the old car with a soapy sponge. Tom rinsed the old car with clean water. Tom dried the old car with a soft towel.
The candle burned on the wooden dinner table. The candle dripped hot wax onto a brass holder. The candle flickered in a light hallway draft. The candle went out with a thin curl of smoke.
The river swelled with brown storm water. The river spilled over the low grassy banks. The river covered the nearby fields with mud. The river settled into a calm steady flow.
The cat spotted the gray mouse near the pantry. The cat crept across the cold kitchen tiles. The cat pounced on the gray mouse. The cat carried the gray mouse to the back step.
The old bridge creaked under a heavy truck. The old bridge cracked along a rusty beam. The old bridge sagged toward the cold river. The old bridge closed for urgent repairs.

Grandpa stacked the logs in the stone fireplace. Grandpa lit the logs with a long wooden match. Grandpa warmed cold hands near the bright fire. Grandpa dozed in a soft armchair by the stone fireplace.
The red balloon slipped from a child's grip. The red balloon rose over the crowded fairground. The red balloon drifted toward a line of trees. The red balloon popped on a sharp branch.
The letter traveled in a canvas mail sack. The letter arrived at a quiet mountain post office. The letter waited in a narrow metal box. The letter reached a grateful old reader in the village.
Leo cracked two eggs into a metal bowl. Leo whisked the batter with a bent fork. Leo poured the batter onto a hot pan. Leo flipped a golden pancake with a wide spatula.

The ice cream sat in the warm paper cup. The ice cream softened in the strong summer heat. The ice cream dripped over the rim of the warm paper cup. The ice cream formed a sticky pool on the picnic table.
Nora wrote the letter at the old oak desk. Nora folded the letter into a neat square. Nora sealed the letter inside the blue envelope. Nora dropped the blue envelope into a corner mailbox.
The wave rose far from the rocky shore. The wave rolled toward the sandy beach. The wave crashed over a striped umbrella. The wave soaked a pile of folded towels.
Priya pumped air into the flat front tire. Priya oiled the squeaky chain of the bike. Priya rode the bike down the gravel lane. Priya parked the bike beside the red mailbox.
The soup simmered in a dented steel pot. The soup thickened with soft chunks of potato. The soup steamed in two ceramic bowls. The soup warmed a pair of hungry hikers.
Ethan carried the kite to a windy hilltop. Ethan unwound the string from a plastic reel. Ethan launched the kite into a strong gust. Ethan watched the kite climb above the pine trees.
The apple hung from a high orchard branch. The apple loosened in a gusty wind. The apple dropped into the tall grass. The apple rolled down a gentle slope.
The train left a busy city station. The train crossed a long steel bridge. The train climbed through a foggy mountain pass. The train arrived at a small coastal town.
Hana loaded the uniforms into the old washer. Hana added a scoop of lavender soap to the old washer. Hana hung the uniforms on a long clothesline. Hana folded the uniforms into a wicker basket.
The volcano rumbled under the quiet island. The volcano spewed ash into the gray sky. The volcano poured lava down a steep slope. The volcano buried a coastal road in black rock.
The spider climbed to a corner of the shed. The spider spun a wide silver web. The spider waited at the edge of the wide silver web. The spider wrapped a trapped fly in silk.
Omar ground the coffee in a small hand mill. Omar poured hot water over the coffee. Omar filled a striped mug with the coffee. Omar sipped the coffee on the sunny balcony.
The puppy grabbed the red slipper from the hallway. The puppy chewed a hole in the red slipper. The puppy dropped the red slipper under the couch. The puppy hid behind a stack of pillows.
The plane taxied along a wet runway. The plane lifted into a cloudy sky. The plane climbed above a thick gray layer. The plane leveled off in bright sunshine.
Ruth cut the squares from a pile of old shirts. Ruth pinned the squares into a star pattern. Ruth stitched the squares into the warm quilt. Ruth spread the warm quilt over a guest bed.
The fog crept in from the cold harbor. The fog wrapped the docks in a gray blanket. The fog hid the tall masts of the boats. The fog lifted under a warm bright sun.
Sam packed wet sand into the plastic bucket. Sam flipped the plastic bucket onto the smooth beach. Sam carved windows into the sand tower. Sam watched the tide wash over the sand tower.
The lamp buzzed on the cluttered desk. The lamp flickered with a weak yellow glow. The lamp dimmed to a faint spark. The lamp went dark with a soft click.
The goat nudged the latch on the pen gate. The goat pushed the pen gate wide open. The goat wandered into the vegetable rows. The goat ate a row of young lettuce plants.
Lily squeezed ripe lemons into the glass jug. Lily stirred sugar and cold water into the glass jug. Lily set a small stand at the street corner. Lily sold cold lemonade to thirsty joggers.
The moth circled the bright porch light. The moth bumped against the warm glass cover. The moth landed on the window screen. The moth folded two dusty wings to rest.
The milk heated in a small saucepan. The milk foamed near the rim of the small saucepan. The milk spilled over the hot stove. The milk left a burnt smell in the kitchen.
Diego taped the edges of the bedroom wall. Diego rolled blue paint across the bedroom wall. Diego peeled the tape from the bedroom wall. Diego stored the roller and tray in the garage.
The crab scuttled out of a shallow tide pool. The crab crossed a stretch of warm sand. The crab found the shiny empty shell near a rock. The crab squeezed into the shiny empty shell.
The acorn dropped from a tall oak branch. The acorn sank into the soft forest soil. The acorn sprouted a thin pale root. The acorn grew into a small green seedling.
Mia sawed a long plank on two sawhorses. Mia nailed the cut pieces into the birdhouse. Mia drilled a round entry hole in the birdhouse. Mia hung the birdhouse from a maple branch.
The ferry loaded cars at the wooden dock. The ferry crossed the wide gray bay. The ferry docked on the far shore. The ferry unloaded cars near a lighthouse.
The chick pecked at the smooth shell wall. The chick pushed through a widening crack. The chick tumbled onto the straw bedding. The chick dried into a fluffy yellow ball.

The tailor unrolled the gray wool on a long table. The tailor cut the gray wool with sharp shears. The tailor stitched the gray wool into the new jacket. The tailor pressed the new jacket with a heavy iron.
The skater stepped onto the frozen pond. The skater glided across the smooth ice. The skater spun near the snowy bank. The skater bowed to a small cheering crowd.
The pizza slid into the brick oven. The pizza bubbled in the strong heat. The pizza came out with a golden crust. The pizza vanished at a crowded party table.
Noah spread the tent on flat dry ground. Noah tapped metal stakes into the hard soil. Noah raised the tent with two curved poles. Noah zipped the tent shut against the cold wind.
The comet appeared over the dark ridge. The comet brightened above the quiet valley. The comet streaked across the starry sky. The comet faded beyond the far horizon.
The stain appeared on the white tablecloth. The stain spread into a wide purple ring. The stain resisted a rough soapy scrub. The stain faded under a strong lemon cleaner.
The bee left the crowded wooden hive. The bee landed on a purple garden flower. The bee gathered bright yellow pollen in tiny baskets. The bee returned to the crowded wooden hive.
The bus stopped at a busy corner. The bus picked up a line of tired workers. The bus rolled through heavy downtown traffic. The bus reached a leafy stop beside the park.

Grandma picked the ripe berries from the garden bushes. Grandma boiled the ripe berries with plenty of sugar. Grandma poured the hot jam into the clean jars. Grandma lined the clean jars on a pantry shelf.
The glacier cracked with a deep boom. The glacier dropped a huge ice block into the sea. The glacier sent tall waves across the bay. The glacier stood quiet above the cold water.
The mechanic raised the car on a steel lift. The mechanic drained the dark oil into a pan. The mechanic fitted a clean new filter. The mechanic lowered the car onto the shop floor.
The seagull circled a busy boardwalk stand. The seagull dove toward a paper basket of fries. The seagull snatched a long golden fry. The seagull flew off toward the wooden pier.
The paper boat floated down a narrow gutter stream. The paper boat spun around a shiny drain grate. The paper boat soaked up the cold water. The paper boat sank beside the curb.
Ava reviewed a stack of history notes. Ava entered the silent exam hall. Ava answered every question with a steady hand. Ava handed the finished paper to the proctor.
The leak started under the kitchen sink. The leak dripped into a metal bucket. The leak soaked the wooden cabinet floor. The leak stopped under a plumber's new seal.
The parade formed near the old courthouse. The parade marched down the main avenue. The parade turned at the stone fountain. The parade ended in the crowded fairground.
The mail carrier loaded a heavy canvas sack. The mail carrier walked along the maple-lined street. The mail carrier slid letters into narrow slots. The mail carrier waved to a friendly shop owner.
The beaver felled a young birch by the stream. The beaver dragged the young birch through the water. The beaver wedged the young birch into the dam wall. The beaver packed mud around the dam wall.
The orchestra tuned in the dim concert hall. The orchestra opened with a soft slow melody. The orchestra built toward a thunderous crashing chord. The orchestra bowed to a long standing ovation.
Ben packed wet snow into the low round wall. Ben carved a doorway into the low round wall. Ben smoothed the low round wall with a mitten. Ben sat behind the low round wall with a grin.
The engine coughed at the turn of the key. The engine sputtered with a weak rhythm. The engine caught with a sudden roar. The engine settled into a smooth idle.
The vine climbed the side of the brick wall. The vine wrapped around a rusty drainpipe. The vine reached the edge of the roof. The vine bloomed with small white flowers.

The chef seared the salmon fillet in a hot pan. The chef set the salmon fillet on the white plate. The chef drizzled lemon sauce over the salmon fillet. The chef carried the white plate to a corner table.
The sun dipped toward the purple hills. The sun painted the clouds in orange light. The sun slipped below the dark ridge. The sun left a soft glow on the water.
The turtle crawled out of the warm lagoon. The turtle dug a deep nest in the dry sand. The turtle laid a clutch of round eggs. The turtle slipped back into the warm lagoon.
The elevator opened on the ground floor. The elevator carried a crowd of office workers. The elevator hummed past a row of lit numbers. The elevator stopped at the top floor with a chime.
Jack rowed the small boat to the quiet shallows. Jack cast a silver lure across the quiet shallows. Jack reeled in a fat spotted bass. Jack rowed the small boat back to the old dock.
The printer hummed on the office shelf. The printer pulled the sheet from the paper tray. The printer pressed dark ink onto the sheet. The printer dropped the sheet into a plastic bin.
The tide crept up the flat gray beach. The tide surrounded a tall sandcastle. The tide washed over the tall sandcastle. The tide left a smooth bare stretch of sand.

The teacher collected the stack of quizzes. The teacher marked the stack of quizzes with a red pen. The teacher recorded the scores in a leather book. The teacher returned the stack of quizzes with kind notes.
The avalanche broke loose on the steep slope. The avalanche roared down the mountain face. The avalanche buried the empty ski trail. The avalanche settled into a deep white heap.
Zoe raked the dry leaves into a heap. Zoe stuffed the dry leaves into the paper bags. Zoe dragged the paper bags to the curb. Zoe swept the clean path with a stiff broom.
The lion paced along the iron fence. The lion sniffed the slab of fresh meat. The lion dragged the slab of fresh meat into the shade. The lion dozed in the shade with a full belly.
The rocket stood on the concrete launch pad. The rocket rose on a column of white flame. The rocket pierced a layer of thin cloud. The rocket vanished into the black upper sky.

The florist trimmed the long stems of the red roses. The florist arranged the red roses in the glass vase. The florist tied a silk ribbon around the glass vase. The florist set the glass vase in the shop window.
The wind picked up over the open plain. The wind bent the tall roadside grass. The wind tore the kite from a child's grip. The wind carried the kite over the rooftops.
The hikers followed a steep rocky trail. The hikers crossed a shallow icy creek. The hikers reached a windy granite summit. The hikers rested beside a stone marker.
The potter centered the wet clay on the wheel. The potter shaped the wet clay into the tall vase. The potter fired the tall vase in the hot kiln. The potter glazed the tall vase a deep sea blue.
The frost formed on the quiet meadow. The frost coated every blade of grass. The frost sparkled under the rising sun. The frost melted into tiny bright drops.
Owen glued the balsa wings to the thin body. Owen painted the model plane bright red. Owen wound the rubber band inside the model plane. Owen launched the model plane across the park lawn.
The ant found the fallen crumb of cake. The ant lifted the fallen crumb of cake overhead. The ant carried the fallen crumb of cake across the patio. The ant disappeared into a crack in the bricks.

The gardener sharpened the long pruning shears. The gardener clipped the wild hedge into a neat square. The gardener raked the fallen clippings into a bin. The gardener stored the long pruning shears in the shed.
The owl woke in the hollow oak trunk. The owl swooped over the moonlit field. The owl caught a plump field mouse. The owl returned to the hollow oak trunk.
The pie baked to a deep golden brown. The pie cooled on the kitchen windowsill. The pie tempted the hungry neighbor at the window. The pie lost a wide wedge to the hungry neighbor.
The runner stretched beside the cinder track. The runner sprinted around the long oval. The runner crossed the white chalk line. The runner gulped water from a paper cup.
The icicle grew from the barn gutter. The icicle stretched toward the snowy ground. The icicle snapped in a burst of wind. The icicle shattered on the frozen path.

The grocer unpacked the crate of oranges by the door. The grocer stacked the oranges into a neat pyramid. The grocer wrote a price on a small chalkboard. The grocer sold the oranges to a steady stream of shoppers.
The music box opened with a soft click. The music box turned a tiny brass cylinder. The music box played a slow gentle tune. The music box wound down into silence.
The lantern swung from a low porch beam. The lantern cast long shapes across the yard. The lantern guttered in a damp gust. The lantern went dark with a hiss.
Ella wound the blue yarn into a loose ball. Ella cast the blue yarn onto wooden needles. Ella knitted row upon row of tight stitches. Ella folded the soft new scarf into a gift box.

The tugboat chugged out of the misty harbor. The tugboat looped a thick rope around the loaded barge. The tugboat pulled the loaded barge past the breakwater. The tugboat guided the loaded barge to an open berth.
The popcorn rattled in the covered steel pot. The popcorn popped in quick bright bursts. The popcorn filled the covered steel pot to the lid. The popcorn spilled into a striped paper bowl.

The detective studied the muddy footprints by the gate. The detective followed the muddy footprints across the lawn. The detective found a torn glove near the hedge. The detective sealed the torn glove in a clear bag.

The barber draped the striped cape over the customer. The barber trimmed the customer's shaggy hair. The barber brushed stray clippings from the striped cape. The barber held a round mirror behind the customer.
The moon rose over the dark pine ridge. The moon slid into the earth's long shadow. The moon glowed a deep dusty red. The moon drifted out of the earth's long shadow.
The bubble rose from a plastic wand. The bubble drifted over the sunny lawn. The bubble caught a swirl of rainbow light. The bubble burst on a rose thorn.
noncausal_texts: The library lent a heavy atlas. The library hosted a chess tournament. The library displayed old framed photographs. The library received a donated wooden shelf from a volunteer.
The museum displayed a bronze statue in the east hall. The museum hired a new night guard. The museum sold colorful postcards in the gift shop. The museum repainted the lobby ceiling.
The bakery sold warm cinnamon rolls to eager customers. The bakery replaced a cracked front window. The bakery hosted a small cake contest. The bakery donated leftover bread to a shelter.
The farmer repaired a sagging wire fence. The farmer sold brown eggs at a roadside stall. The farmer painted the barn door dark red. The farmer attended a county planning meeting.
The school organized a lively science fair. The school planted a young maple near the gate. The school bought new mats for the gym. The school welcomed a visiting firefighter as a speaker.
The hotel hosted a noisy wedding reception. The hotel printed new breakfast menus. The hotel replaced the worn lobby sofas. The hotel hired a pastry chef from abroad.
The sailor mended a torn canvas sail. The sailor photographed a distant striped lighthouse. The sailor played cards with the harbor crew. The sailor bought a wool cap at a port shop.
The bookshop stocked a shelf of travel guides. The bookshop hosted a poetry reading. The bookshop adopted a lazy orange cat. The bookshop installed a brass bell above the door.
The mayor opened a new footbridge. The mayor judged a pie contest at the fair. The mayor visited a local fire station. The mayor planted a tree outside city hall.
The circus featured a juggling clown. The circus raffled a giant stuffed bear. The circus sold roasted peanuts near the entrance. The circus hired a trapeze artist from Brazil.
The airline introduced a direct route to Lisbon. The airline repainted a jet in bright colors. The airline added a lemon dessert to the flight menu. The airline sponsored a youth soccer team.
The village held a summer lantern festival. The village repaired the old stone well. The village welcomed a traveling puppet troupe. The village painted the bus shelter bright blue.
The cook entered a televised cooking contest. The cook bought a copper pot at a flea market. The cook taught a class on knife skills. The cook planted basil in a rooftop garden.
The zoo welcomed a pair of red pandas. The zoo installed a shaded picnic area. The zoo hosted a drawing contest for children. The zoo repaired the flamingo pond fence.
The band recorded a song in a garage. The band sold shirts at a street fair. The band donated an old drum kit to a school. The band posed for photos beside a mural.
The professor published an article on desert beetles. The professor bought a secondhand telescope. The professor judged a student debate. The professor hiked a coastal trail with colleagues.
The theater staged a comedy about pirates. The theater replaced the faded velvet curtains. The theater sold caramel popcorn in the lobby. The theater hosted a costume exhibit upstairs.
The clinic vaccinated a group of travelers. The clinic painted the waiting room pale green. The clinic hired a friendly receptionist. The clinic donated crutches to a rural hospital.
The market sold striped melons from a nearby farm. The market featured a cheese stall from the mountains. The market hosted a fiddle player near the gate. The market raffled a basket of rare spices.
The astronaut signed posters at a science fair. The astronaut grew radishes in a lab experiment. The astronaut ran a charity race in the rain. The astronaut donated a flight suit to a museum.

The dressmaker donated fabric scraps to an art class. The dressmaker won a ribbon at a craft fair. The dressmaker repaired an antique sewing machine. The dressmaker sketched a coat design on brown paper.
The cafe brewed a new blend from Kenya. The cafe hung local paintings on the walls. The cafe hosted a trivia night. The cafe replaced the wobbly corner table.
The team washed cars for a charity fundraiser. The team designed a new falcon logo. The team visited a children's hospital. The team practiced penalty kicks under floodlights.
The mountain lodge served venison stew to a tour group. The mountain lodge installed a cedar sauna. The mountain lodge hosted a yodeling contest. The mountain lodge repaired the loose roof shingles.
The aquarium fed the octopus a crab snack. The aquarium unveiled a glowing jellyfish tank. The aquarium printed maps in four languages. The aquarium hosted a sleepover for scouts.
The brewery bottled a batch of ginger ale. The brewery gave a tour to a cycling club. The brewery sponsored a darts league night. The brewery repainted the delivery van.
The knight polished a dented steel shield. The knight rode in a village parade. The knight donated a sword to a monastery. The knight judged an archery contest.

The flower stall offered tulips from a local grower. The flower stall raffled a large potted orchid. The flower stall displayed a wall of dried lavender. The flower stall donated roses to a nursing home.
The ranch hosted a rodeo for local riders. The ranch sold two palomino horses. The ranch repaired the creaky windmill blades. The ranch welcomed a film crew for a documentary.
The pilot flew a supply run to a remote island. The pilot bought a leather flight jacket. The pilot gave a talk at an aviation club. The pilot photographed a glacier from the cockpit.
The orchard donated apples to a school kitchen. The orchard hosted a cider tasting. The orchard repaired the wooden entry gate. The orchard welcomed a beekeeper with two hives.
The newspaper printed a feature on lighthouse keepers. The newspaper hired a crossword editor. The newspaper sponsored a spelling bee. The newspaper moved the archive to a dry basement.
The gym installed a tall climbing wall. The gym hosted a charity spin class. The gym replaced the locker room mirrors. The gym gave away water bottles at the front desk.

The lighthouse keeper painted the railing bright white. The lighthouse keeper baked a loaf of rye bread. The lighthouse keeper rescued a tangled gull. The lighthouse keeper mailed a postcard to a cousin.
The studio recorded a jingle for a bakery. The studio bought a vintage ribbon microphone. The studio hosted an open mic night. The studio soundproofed the back room.
The park unveiled a granite fountain. The park hosted an outdoor film screening. The park planted a bed of marigolds. The park repaired the swings near the pond.
The dentist sponsored a youth hockey team. The dentist framed a diploma for the office wall. The dentist attended a conference in Denver. The dentist donated toothbrushes to a shelter.
The choir performed at a harvest festival. The choir recorded a lullaby album. The choir sold cookies to fund new robes. The choir welcomed three new tenors.
The carpenter built a cradle for a neighbor. The carpenter sharpened a set of chisels. The carpenter entered a woodworking fair. The carpenter donated sawdust to a stable.
The observatory photographed a distant nebula. The observatory hosted a public stargazing night. The observatory replaced a cracked dome panel. The observatory published a star chart for beginners.
The mailroom sorted a crate of festival parcels. The mailroom installed a new label printer. The mailroom recycled a mountain of cardboard. The mailroom shared a box of doughnuts with the staff.
The vineyard bottled a crisp white wine. The vineyard hosted a harvest picnic. The vineyard repaired the stone terrace wall. The vineyard welcomed a tour bus from Lyon.
The firehouse polished the brass pole. The firehouse adopted a spotted dalmatian. The firehouse hosted a pancake breakfast. The firehouse repainted the garage doors.
The gymnast won a silver medal at a regional meet. The gymnast modeled for a sportswear catalog. The gymnast visited an elementary school. The gymnast donated old leotards to a club.
The bank sponsored a downtown art walk. The bank installed a coin counting machine. The bank raffled two concert tickets. The bank planted flowers by the entrance.
The harbor welcomed a tall training ship. The harbor dredged the shallow north channel. The harbor hosted a seafood festival. The harbor installed new mooring cleats.
The magician performed at a charity gala. The magician bought a crate of trick ropes. The magician taught a card class for beginners. The magician donated a top hat to a museum.
The scout troop cleaned a stretch of riverbank. The scout troop baked bread over open coals. The scout troop mapped a winding forest trail. The scout troop visited a retired park ranger.
The opera house hosted a masked ball. The opera house restored a painted ceiling fresco. The opera house hired a young conductor. The opera house sold seat cushions at a fundraiser.
The candy shop invented a plum lollipop. The candy shop sponsored a parade float. The candy shop replaced the striped awning. The candy shop mailed samples to a food critic.
The dairy delivered cream to a mountain cafe. The dairy painted the tall silo silver. The dairy won a ribbon for aged cheddar. The dairy hosted a calf naming contest.
The barbershop installed a jukebox from the fifties. The barbershop hosted a mustache contest. The barbershop donated haircuts at a job fair. The barbershop repainted the spinning pole.
The kayak club paddled around a rocky islet. The kayak club hosted a knot tying workshop. The kayak club bought six new paddles. The kayak club cleaned litter from a quiet cove.

The chess master played twenty games at once in a mall. The chess master autographed boards at a tournament. The chess master donated sets to a city library. The chess master gave a lecture on endgames.
The garden center sold a truckload of tulip bulbs. The garden center hosted a bonsai demonstration. The garden center adopted a stray tabby. The garden center repaired the greenhouse fans.

The radio station interviewed a local beekeeper. The radio station raffled a pair of festival passes. The radio station upgraded the tower warning lights. The radio station aired a documentary about ferries.
The soap maker crafted a batch of lavender bars. The soap maker taught a class at a craft fair. The soap maker designed a new paper label. The soap maker shipped a crate to a seaside spa.
The bowling alley waxed the wooden lanes. The bowling alley hosted a glow night for teens. The bowling alley replaced the worn shoe rack. The bowling alley sold nachos for a team fundraiser.
The train museum restored a red caboose. The train museum printed tickets on vintage card stock. The train museum hosted a model railway show. The train museum welcomed a class of first graders.
The surf shop rented boards to a bachelor party. The surf shop painted a wave mural on the wall. The surf shop sponsored a beach cleanup day. The surf shop stocked a rack of striped towels.
The mill ground a sack of rye for a baker. The mill replaced a worn leather drive belt. The mill hosted a bread fair in the yard. The mill welcomed a painter with an easel.
The embassy hosted a film night in the garden. The embassy issued a travel bulletin. The embassy planted a cherry tree in the courtyard. The embassy welcomed a trade delegation.
The toy store demonstrated a wooden train set. The toy store hosted a puppet show. The toy store donated building blocks to a clinic. The toy store restocked a shelf of kites.
The fisherman carved a wooden decoy duck. The fisherman sold smoked trout at a market. The fisherman repaired a broken lobster trap. The fisherman told stories at a dockside tavern.
The ballet company toured three coastal cities. The ballet company sewed new tutus for the corps. The ballet company hosted an open rehearsal. The ballet company auctioned a pair of signed slippers.
The ski resort groomed the beginner slope. The ski resort hosted a torchlight parade. The ski resort upgraded the chairlift cables. The ski resort sold hot cider at the base lodge.

The publisher released a cookbook about hearty stews. The publisher signed a young mystery writer. The publisher moved the office to a brick loft. The publisher donated dictionaries to a village school.
The nurse organized a blood drive at a mall. The nurse knitted a blanket for a raffle. The nurse attended a seminar on burn care. The nurse planted herbs on a windowsill.
The blacksmith forged a set of iron hooks. The blacksmith demonstrated at a heritage fair. The blacksmith repaired a garden gate for a church. The blacksmith bought a truckload of charcoal.

The wildlife refuge tagged a family of river otters. The wildlife refuge built an osprey nesting platform. The wildlife refuge hosted a photography walk. The wildlife refuge cleared a patch of invasive vines.
The diner introduced a peach milkshake. The diner replaced the cracked vinyl stools. The diner hosted a pie eating contest. The diner framed a photo of a famous customer.
The climbing gym set a new overhang route. The climbing gym hosted a youth competition. The climbing gym replaced the thick crash pads. The climbing gym sold chalk bags at the counter.
The post office unveiled a stamp with a moose. The post office repaired the lobby wall clock. The post office hired a cheerful new clerk. The post office hosted a letter writing day.
The film crew shot a chase scene on a bridge. The film crew rented a fleet of vintage taxis. The film crew catered lunch from a taco truck. The film crew built a fake storefront downtown.
The pharmacy stocked a shelf of herbal teas. The pharmacy sponsored a booth at a health fair. The pharmacy repainted the front sign. The pharmacy donated first aid kits to a summer camp.
The rowing club varnished the oldest shell. The rowing club hosted a spaghetti fundraiser. The rowing club welcomed five new members. The rowing club raced a rival crew on the estuary.
The glassblower shaped a swan from molten glass. The glassblower taught a workshop for tourists. The glassblower repaired the furnace door. The glassblower sold vases at a harbor fair.
The animal shelter hosted an adoption day. The animal shelter received a pallet of donated kibble. The animal shelter photographed the newest arrivals. The animal shelter fixed the leaky kennel roof.

The comic artist inked a cover for a magazine. The comic artist signed prints at a convention. The comic artist donated sketches to a charity auction. The comic artist bought a tilting drafting table.
The spa added a eucalyptus steam room. The spa hosted a couples yoga session. The spa replaced the fluffy white robes. The spa planted bamboo along the front walkway.

The hardware store mixed paint for a mural project. The hardware store hosted a birdhouse building workshop. The hardware store donated shovels to a garden club. The hardware store repaired the squeaky front door.
The night market sold skewers of grilled squid. The night market featured a fire dancer. The night market raffled a bicycle. The night market strung lanterns between the stalls.
The judge grew prize tomatoes in a backyard plot. The judge published a memoir about rural courts. The judge coached a school debate team. The judge restored a wooden canoe.
The ice rink hosted a curling exhibition. The ice rink resurfaced the scratched ice sheet. The ice rink sold hot cocoa at the snack bar. The ice rink installed brighter ceiling lights.

The travel agency booked a safari for a retired couple. The travel agency printed brochures about northern fjords. The travel agency won a customer service award. The travel agency decorated the window with paper globes.
The daycare painted a rainbow on the fence. The daycare hosted a teddy bear picnic. The daycare bought a set of nap mats. The daycare welcomed a visiting storyteller.
The butcher cured a batch of maple bacon. The butcher sponsored a chili cookoff booth. The butcher sharpened every knife in the case. The butcher delivered sausages to a wedding feast.
The planetarium projected a show about comets. The planetarium upgraded the reclining seats. The planetarium hosted a lecture on ocean tides. The planetarium sold star maps at the kiosk.

The quilting circle stitched a banner for the fair. The quilting circle donated blankets to a shelter. The quilting circle welcomed two new members. The quilting circle photographed a finished sampler quilt.
The arcade restored a pinball machine from the eighties. The arcade hosted a high score contest. The arcade replaced the broken token machine. The arcade painted the entrance neon pink.
The botanist pressed ferns for a university archive. The botanist named a newly found orchid. The botanist lectured on alpine mosses. The botanist photographed a rare desert bloom.
The riding stable hosted a pony party for a birthday. The riding stable repaired the paddock rails. The riding stable bought a load of fresh hay. The riding stable welcomed a retired show horse.
The tea house imported a chest of oolong. The tea house hosted a calligraphy evening. The tea house replaced the paper lanterns. The tea house planted a plum tree by the pond.
The startup launched an app for plant care. The startup moved into a sunny loft office. The startup hired a designer from Oslo. The startup sponsored a local hackathon.

The lifeguard station hosted a rescue demonstration. The lifeguard station repainted the tower steps. The lifeguard station received a donated rescue board. The lifeguard station posted a chart of local currents.
The mining museum displayed a giant quartz crystal. The mining museum offered a lantern lit tunnel tour. The mining museum sold fudge in the gift shop. The mining museum restored a rusty ore cart.
The bee farm harvested a batch of clover honey. The bee farm hosted a tasting under a tent. The bee farm painted the hive boxes pastel colors. The bee farm shipped candles to a craft store.

The community center hosted a salsa dance night. The community center installed a wheelchair ramp. The community center screened a film about whales. The community center lent folding tables to a church.
The weaver dyed a batch of wool with indigo. The weaver entered a rug in a county show. The weaver repaired an antique loom pedal. The weaver taught a workshop on plaid patterns.
The seaside inn served oysters at a garden party. The seaside inn replaced the faded window shutters. The seaside inn hosted a watercolor painting retreat. The seaside inn adopted a gray harbor cat.
